settings.title: Twenty Years of Caring for Local Pets
settings.excerpt: This spring the clinic turns twenty, and we have cared for some families across three generations of pets.
settings.body:
Twenty years ago Tailside opened as a single room practice with one vet and a borrowed microscope. Today we care for thousands of animals, and some families have brought us their pets across three generations.

It is a strange and lovely thing to have known a family's first puppy, then their children's first pet, and now the next dog after that.

To mark the anniversary, we are offering free microchipping throughout May, because a chipped pet stands the best chance of finding its way home.

We are also supporting the local rescue shelter with a donation for every chip we fit. Thank you for trusting us with the animals you love.
